name: Zero
description:
күӮ(ЛөЛғ б—ң ЛӮЛө)

Context

Zero is the secret identity and mask of Lelouch vi Britannia, an exiled prince of the Britannian Empire. He suddenly appears in Area 11 (formerly Japan) to lead the resistance against Britannian occupation. Zero becomes the symbol of rebellion, the leader of the Black Knights, and later the Emperor of Britannia. The mask represents the absence of identity, pride, and lies вҖ“ a philosophical idea Lelouch borrows from his friend Suzaku.

күӮ(ЛөЛғ б—ң ЛӮЛө)күӮ(ЛөЛғ б—ң ЛӮЛө)күӮ(ЛөЛғ б—ң ЛӮЛө)

Biography

Bearer : Lelouch vi Britannia (primary), later Suzaku Kururugi (after the Zero Requiem)

First appearance : Episode 1, saving the nascent Black Knights

Symbol : Justice, vengeance, liberation of Japan

Abilities : No particular physical abilities, but Lelouch's Geass (absolute command once per person) and unmatched strategic intelligence

Arc : From terrorist leader вҶ’ recognized military commander вҶ’ Emperor of Britannia вҶ’ legendary martyr
